name: Ruby Mediator
title: Negotiator of the red accords

abilities.name: Truce
abilities.text: No damage is dealt next turn by either side.

typed_abilities.name: Truce
typed_abilities.text: No damage is dealt next turn by either side.

flavor_text: Every peace ends in red ink or red blood — she prefers the ink.
